description: During winter operations, an aircraft has accumulated snow and ice on its wings and must be de-iced before departure.

nodes.task_description: The flight crew requests de-icing from the ground crew.

expected_outcome.value: Ground crew receives and acknowledges the request.

nodes.task_description: The de-icing truck sprays the aircraft's critical surfaces with de-icing fluid.

expected_outcome.value: The de-icing procedure is performed correctly.

nodes.task_description: The ground crew informs the flight crew of the type of fluid used and the start time of the final application, which determines the holdover time.

expected_outcome.value: Ground crew provides the pilots with the necessary information for a safe takeoff.
